title: clinopodium yakusimense
intro: Clinopodium yakusimense, also known as Japanese mountain basil, is a species of flowering plant in the mint family Lamiaceae. This plant is known for its medicinal properties, particularly in its essential oil, which contains compounds such as borneol and borneol acetate. Clinopodium yakusimense has been found to have various health benefits, including reducing inflammation, relieving digestive issues, and exhibiting antimicrobial properties. In herbal medicine, the plant is often prepared as a tea, infusion, or oil, and is traditionally used to treat respiratory issues, fever, and skin conditions.
